name: SecureApp
description: A web application with user authentication, role-based access control, and session management
vision: A production-ready authentication system with secure login, registration, password reset, and role-based authorization that can be integrated into any web application

majorPhases.title: User Authentication
majorPhases.description: Implement user registration, login, password reset, and session management. Includes JWT-based auth tokens, bcrypt password hashing, email verification flow, and role-based access control middleware.
